all_posts_clr.caption_preview: everyone says they want to be “successful”  but no one wants
all_posts_clr.caption_full:
everyone says they want to be “successful”

but no one wants to back up their talk with actual work

i started in business when i was 16, everything ive achieved is the result of 5 years of consistent work every single day 

i kept going and today I’ve made some pretty cool achievements at 20:

i moved into my dream London apartment, scaled my consulting business to $230k/mo while in uni and made my asian parents proud

commit to showing up every day, put in the work, and one day people will start calling you “lucky”

everyone asks how i speak so well

i’ve been filming content for 2 years, did sales for 5 years, and started working on my communication since i was 16

and i still make tons of mistakes 

when you see my reels and youtube videos, it’s years of work and practice you don’t see

content is genuinely one of the hardest skills to master but if you show up everyday, you will win
